prompt: Create a dramatic vertical fantasy concept art scene of a towering anthropomorphic elephant berserker in heavy steampunk armor, standing in a smoky battlefield. The character has gray wrinkled elephant skin, huge ears, long ivory tusks with metal bands, a raised curling trunk, and an open roaring mouth. Dress the warrior in layered dark gunmetal plate armor with brass trim, rivets, leather straps, shoulder guards, bracers, knee guards, a small riveted helmet, utility pouches, and ornate mechanical gears on the belt and chest. The warrior grips a massive two-handed chained mace: a long wrapped metal handle connected by a thick chain to an enormous spherical iron wrecking ball covered in rivets and sharp spikes. The mace head is a steampunk engine-like weapon with glowing orange furnace vents, exposed inner machinery, round exhaust ports blasting white steam, sparks flying from impact, and scorched metal panels. Show dust, debris, smoke plumes, embers, and motion energy around the weapon as if it has just smashed into the ground. Background: a ruined industrial battlefield with blurred broken structures, gray smoke columns, cloudy sky, and gritty war atmosphere. Use cinematic low-angle composition, hyper-detailed realistic rendering, sharp focus on the warrior and weapon, volumetric smoke, dramatic natural light, metallic reflections, warm orange glow contrasting with cold gray armor, epic dark fantasy mood. Main customization: steam-powered spiked wrecking ball mace, heavy brass-and-gunmetal steampunk plate armor, ruined smoky industrial war zone, ferocious epic battle roar.
